LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF VILLA FLORENCE HOTEL, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO SHOW A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO PLAINTIFF'S RIGHT UNDER THE LEASE AND ESTOPPEL STATEMENT, TO PERCENTAGE RENT, OR TO CARRY ITS BURDEN TO ESTABLISH AN AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE TO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VILLA FLORENCE HOTEL, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, JOHN $54,671.72 PRINCIPAL, $26,470.50 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,192.55 COSTS, $9,984.43 ACCRUED PREJUDGMENT INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $93,319.20, SEE SCANNED DOC
